nasb.text: For nothing is hidden that will not become evident, nor anything secret that will not be known and come to light.

esv.text: For nothing is hidden that will not be made manifest, nor is anything secret that will not be known and come to light.

cnv.text: 因為沒有甚麼隱藏的事不被顯明，也沒有甚麼掩蓋的事不被人知道而暴露出來。

ccb.text: 掩盖的事终会暴露出来，隐藏的秘密终会被人知道。

csbs.text: 隐秘的事没有不显露的，隐藏的事绝没有不被知道、不显露出来的。
